nasb.text: And Balaam lifted up his eyes and saw Israel camping tribe by tribe; and the Spirit of God came upon him.

esv.text: And Balaam lifted up his eyes and saw Israel camping tribe by tribe. And the Spirit of God came upon him,

cnv.text: 巴蘭舉目，看見以色列人按著支派居住，　神的靈就臨到他身上。

ccb.text: 举目四望，看见以色列人按支派扎营。上帝的灵降在他身上，
